Post.title: Diary Post
Post.description: A single diary entry or blog post.

title.description: The title of the diary entry.

content.description: The content of the diary entry (Markdown supported).

publishedAt.description: The date and time the entry was published (allows backdating).

createdAt.description: The date and time the entry was created.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the entry was last updated.

authorUid.description: The UID of the author who created the entry.
